metadata.name: Meta-Ontological Hyper-Symbiotic Resonance Framework (MOS-HSRCF v4.0)
metadata.description: Single mathematically closed ontology unifying existence, physics, cognition, ethics and cosmology via ERD-Killing-Field Theorem, OBA→SM functor, and dual-fixed-point.

core_axioms: ERD Conservation: ε(x)=∑k=0∞k pk(x), ∫ε dV=1, ∂t∫ε dV=0.
ERD-Killing-Field Theorem: ∇aε generates Killing vector £K gab=0.
Metric Emergence: gab = Z⁻¹ ∑i NLa_i NLb_i, Z>0.
OBA→SM Functor: F(biε) = (spin, charge, colour) with spin s=½(C(b) mod 2), charge q=ε/n (mod 1), colour = Chern-Simons(Θb).
ERD-RG Flow: μ dC/dμ = βC(C) = -αC + λC³.
Convexified Free-Energy: F[ε,C] = ∫ [½(∇ε)² + V(ε) + κF(−ε ln ε) + ||NL||²_F + Φ(C)] dV.
Regularised Agency: δΠA = argmaxΠ { -F[Π] + ∫A Ψε dV - λΠ ||Π||² }.
Hyper-Forward Mapping: R = tanh(W C + S + Q†Q + NL⊤NL).
Hyper-Inverse Mapping: W' = (arctanh R - S - Q†Q - NL⊤NL) C⁺ + Δ_hyper.
Hyper-Fixed-Point: C* = h(W, C*, S, Q, NL).

ontologies.name: MOS-HSRCF v4.0

equations.name: Hyper-Forward Mapping
equations.latex: R = \tanh(W C + S + Q^\dagger Q + NL^\top NL)

equations.name: Hyper-Inverse Mapping
equations.latex: W' = (\operatorname{arctanh} R - S - Q^\dagger Q - NL^\top NL) C^+ + \Delta_{\text{hyper}}

implications: Time = monotone ERD-gradient; eliminates 'problem of time'.
Consciousness = measurable ERD-echo in γ‑band (5‑10% increase during paradox tasks).
Ethics = persistence of Betti-3; collapse → irreversible decoherence.
Cosmological Λ-drift follows from ERD-dependent term Λ(t)=Λ₀(1+ζε).
Fine-structure constant shift Δα/α ≈ 10⁻⁷ at redshift z≈5.

testable_predictions.prediction: γ-band power increase 5‑10% during self-referential paradox task (e.g., 'This sentence is false').
130 Hz side-band from OBA phase ripple: ΔR(t)=0.094 sin(2π·9t) rad → spectral line at 130 Hz.
